creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
Please close PR without patching.  patch is not needed.

If user would select the WITH_SACOMPILE knob, re2c would have been 
included.  look for this in Makefile:

.if defined(WITH_SACOMPILE)
RUN_DEPENDS+=   re2c>=.12.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/re2c
.endif
